name: Health Insurance Premium
note: Full medical coverage including dental and vision for employee and dependents

name: Gym Membership
note: Monthly gym membership at partner fitness centers

name: Language Course
note: Weekly language lessons — choice of Spanish, French, German, or Japanese

name: Remote Work Stipend
note: Monthly stipend for home office expenses including internet and utilities

name: Professional Development
note: Annual budget for conferences, online courses, and certifications

name: Life Insurance
note: Company-sponsored life insurance policy — 2x annual salary coverage

name: Mental Health Support
note: Access to counseling services, therapy sessions, and wellness apps

name: Commuter Benefit
note: Public transit pass or monthly parking subsidy

name: Meal Vouchers
note: Daily meal vouchers for use at partner restaurants and food delivery

name: Stock Options
note: Company stock option plan with 4-year vesting schedule
